name: execute_query
description: Execute a SELECT query and retrieve data. Returns rows as arrays. Supports all SELECT operations. Use for data retrieval and analysis.

name: execute_insert
description: Execute INSERT statement to add new records. Returns number of rows affected.

name: execute_update
description: Execute UPDATE statement to modify existing records. Returns number of rows affected. ALWAYS requires WHERE clause.

sql.description: UPDATE SQL with WHERE clause (required). Max 10,000 chars.

name: execute_delete
description: Execute DELETE statement to remove records. Returns number of rows deleted. ALWAYS requires WHERE clause.

sql.description: DELETE SQL with WHERE clause (required). Max 10,000 chars.

name: explain_query
description: Show query execution plan. Use to identify missing indexes and slow queries.

name: list_tables
description: List all user-defined tables with schema and type. Excludes system schemas.

name: describe_table
description: Get detailed column information for a table: names, types, nullability, defaults, keys.

name: list_indexes
description: List all indexes with columns, uniqueness, and type information.

name: list_schemas
description: List all non-system schemas (databases in MariaDB).

name: show_constraints
description: List all table constraints: PRIMARY KEY, FOREIGN KEY, UNIQUE.

name: list_triggers
description: List triggers defined on a specific table.

name: create_table
description: Create a new table with specified columns and constraints.

columns.description: Column definitions (required). Example: ['id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY', 'name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL']

name: drop_table
description: Drop (delete) a table and all its data permanently.

name: create_view
description: Create a database view from a SELECT query.

name: drop_view
description: Drop a view.

name: create_schema
description: Create a new schema (database in MariaDB).

name: drop_schema
description: Drop a schema (database in MariaDB).

name: create_index
description: Create an index on columns for faster queries. Supports UNIQUE indexes.

name: drop_index
description: Drop an index from a table.

name: show_table_status
description: Show table status information: rows, data length, engine, create time, collation.

name: show_processlist
description: Show active database connections and running queries.

name: show_variables
description: Show MariaDB system variables (config settings).

pattern.description: Optional LIKE pattern to filter variables.

name: show_status
description: Show MariaDB server status counters.

pattern.description: Optional LIKE pattern to filter status.

name: show_databases
description: List all databases on the server.

name: show_engines
description: Show available storage engines.

name: list_users
description: List all database users from mysql.user.

name: show_grants
description: Show privileges for a specific user or current user.

user.description: Username (optional). Shows current user if omitted.

name: optimize_table
description: Run OPTIMIZE TABLE to reclaim unused space and defragment data.

name: analyze_table
description: Run ANALYZE TABLE to update index statistics for the query optimizer.

name: check_table
description: Run CHECK TABLE to check a table for errors.

name: flush_tables
description: Flush all tables or specific table.

name: truncate_table
description: Quickly delete all rows from a table.

name: add_column
description: Add a new column to a table.

name: drop_column
description: Drop a column from a table.

name: rename_column
description: Rename a column in a table.

name: alter_column_type
description: Change a column's data type.

name: rename_table
description: Rename a table.

name: create_user
description: Create a new MariaDB user.

name: drop_user
description: Drop a MariaDB user.

name: grant_privileges
description: Grant privileges to a user.

name: revoke_privileges
description: Revoke privileges from a user.

name: show_locks
description: Show current locks held by connections.

name: show_transaction_isolation
description: Show current transaction isolation level.

name: vector_search
description: Perform vector similarity search using MariaDB vector functionality.

name: fulltext_search
description: Perform full-text search on a table with FULLTEXT index.

name: list_fulltext_indexes
description: List all FULLTEXT indexes in the database.
